  • Uses of SimulationEvent in microsim.simulation

    Methods in microsim.simulation with parameters of type SimulationEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Simulation.onSimulationEvent(SimulationEvent e)
    Pipes FrameEvent events from SimulationComponent components to external SimulationListener listeners.

  • Uses of SimulationEvent in microsim.simulation.component

    Methods in microsim.simulation.component with parameters of type SimulationEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SimulationComponent.raiseDebugEvent(SimulationEvent e)
    Raises a debug event, that is an event that is only relevant when debugging is enabled.
    void
    SimulationComponent.raiseEvent(SimulationEvent e)
    Raises a simulation event.

  • Uses of SimulationEvent in microsim.simulation.event

    Subclasses of SimulationEvent in microsim.simulation.event
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BreakEvent
    SimulationEvent that signals simulation DebugShell instance to activate.
    class 
    CycleEvent
    SimulationEvent that represents a simulation cycle.
    class 
    DebugEvent
    SimulationEvent that signals a general event (for debugging purposes) on a simulation component.
    class 
    FrameEvent
    SimulationEvent that signals a VideoDevice has finished rendering to frame buffer
    class 
    HaltEvent
    SimulationEvent that signals simulation owner to power off.
    Methods in microsim.simulation.event with parameters of type SimulationEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SimulationListener.onSimulationEvent(SimulationEvent e)
    Gets called when an event reaches the current object.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<Queue<SimulationEvent>>
    DebugShell.eventQueues
    Event queues per simulation.
    Methods in microsim.ui with parameters of type SimulationEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    DebugShell.log(SimulationEvent event)
    Logs a debug event.
    void
    DebugShell.onSimulationEvent(SimulationEvent e)
    Receives a simulation event.
    void
    VideoWindow.onSimulationEvent(SimulationEvent e)
    Receives FrameEvent events and uses them to update VideoWindow.panel's frame buffer.
